About.title: About Us

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Built for remote owners who need a reliable partner on the ground. We combine European standards with deep local expertise in Morocco.
hero.key_line: One point of contact. Full reporting. No surprises.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.lead: To provide stress-free short-term rental management for owners who are not physically present.
mission.body: We focus on transparency, reliability, and quality. No hidden fees, no surprises. Whether you're selling, renting long-term, or running a short-term rental — we handle everything so you don't have to.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: AtlasStays was founded to bridge the gap between international property owners and local operations in Morocco. We combine European standards with deep local expertise, so your property is managed the way you expect — wherever you are.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Full reporting after every stay. No hidden fees. You always know what's happening.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Consistent quality. We show up, we deliver, and we follow through.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Professional standards in every touchpoint — from listings to turnovers.

local.title: Local Expertise
local.description: Deep knowledge of Moroccan markets, regulations, and operations.

Trust.title: Proof beats promises.
Trust.subtitle: We don't show you testimonials. We show you what we actually deliver after every stay, every inspection, and every listing.

report.title: Photo report after every stay
report.description: Every turnover includes a full photo report so you see exactly how your property was left and how it was prepared for the next guest.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to reduce your concerns.

buyers_contact.a: No. All buyer inquiries, calls, and messages go through us. We screen and qualify buyers before you're involved. You stay informed without being interrupted.

viewings.a: We do. We coordinate and attend all viewings on-site. You don't need to be present — we represent you and report back after each visit.

commission.a: Commission is paid by the buyer, not by you. There is no upfront listing fee and no hidden marketing costs. Everything is defined in a written mandate before we start.

timeline.q: How long does the process take?
timeline.a: Typically 2–4 months for well-priced properties. We give you a realistic timeline during the initial valuation. Market conditions and pricing affect the speed.

notaries.a: Yes. We coordinate directly with the notary — document preparation, verification, and closing logistics. We ensure everything is ready for your signature.

documents.a: We'll provide a complete checklist. Typically: title deed, tax certificates, and ID. We handle verification and notary preparation. You won't chase paperwork alone.

abroad.q: Can I sell while living abroad?
abroad.a: Yes. We're built for owners abroad. We handle everything on-site. You only need to sign at the notary — we can arrange a power of attorney if you can't travel.

items.quote_1: AtlasStays took care of everything — from listing to guest communication and cleaning. I live abroad and never had to worry. Highly recommend.
items.quote_2: Professional, transparent, and reliable. The photo reports after every stay give me peace of mind. My property is in great hands.
items.quote_3: Finally, a management company that actually delivers. No hidden fees, clear communication, and my occupancy has never been better.

points.flat_percentage: We charge a flat percentage of your property's monthly earnings, so we only succeed when you do.
points.no_hidden_costs: All cleaning, maintenance, and listing fees are included in our service fee. No surprise charges.
points.guest_pays_fees: All booking-related fees are covered by the guests, so you don't pay anything upfront.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about our short-term rental management.

platforms.q: Which platforms do you list on?
platforms.a: We list on Airbnb, Booking.com, VRBO, Expedia, Hotels.com, and local platforms. Your property gets maximum visibility across all major channels.

cleaning.q: How do I know the cleaner actually showed up?
cleaning.a: Every turnover includes a photo report sent directly to you. We verify each cleaning and inspection. No-show cleaners are not an option — we track and confirm every visit.

support.q: What if a guest has an issue at 3AM?
support.a: We offer optional 24/7 guest support in English, French, and Arabic. Emergencies are handled by our team so you never get midnight calls.

reporting.q: How do I track revenue and expenses?
reporting.a: You receive monthly revenue and occupancy reports, plus an expense breakdown with receipts. Full transparency. Optional real-time dashboard access.

abroad.q: Can I manage my property from abroad?
abroad.a: Yes. We're built for owners abroad. We handle everything on-site — listing, guests, cleaning, keys, and maintenance. You stay informed through reports and updates.

pricing.a: We offer flexible packages: Starter (cleaning + inspection + photo report), Care (adds linen and restocking), and Full Management (revenue-based). See our pricing page for details.

cta.title: List your property with full management.
cta.subtitle: We handle everything from listing to guest support. You earn. We manage.
